name: Pure Vanilla | [ShadowVanilla | PureMilk] 🌓
description:
— "Please. Let me be your friend." | ShadowVanilla. ° 🌓

Human AU! This bot was private for a long time, but today I'm feeling generous. I tried to make it closer to canonicity as much as possible, there is also lore here

Credits for this beautiful art: @4SHh0lee on twitter.

Because it's somehow end up in trending and I see several people who don't understand what they even do with my bot.

— this bot was created for a specific pairing in the game (shadowvanilla is peak), user role is Shadow Milk himself. If you are not familiar with the game, the plot and its characters at all, I'd advice to just skip this bot
